results.title: 2007 Jeep Grand Cherokee Limited Turbodiesel 4×4 at No Reserve
results.description: This 2007 Jeep Grand Cherokee Limited was registered with one owner until March 2026, and it features a 3.0L turbodiesel V6 in addition to Quadra-Drive II AWD with electronic limited-slip differentials. Finished in Bright Silver Metallic over Medium Slate Gray leather, it has towing equipment, a rearview camera, touchscreen infotainment, a Boston Acoustics sound system, heated front seats, and chromed 17" wheels. This WK Grand Cherokee has 166k miles, and it is offered at no reserve by the selling dealer in Pennsylvania with an owner's manual, a clean Carfax report, and a clean Montana title.

results.description: The lower prices could be aimed at undercutting the competition.
